channel.title: SecurityWizardry Vulnerability Radar (RMFconsultoria)
channel.description: Alertas do SecurityWizardry.com Radar Page - Curado por RMFconsultoria

item.title: wg-easy - Security - CVSS Score v4 - 9.3
item.description: Friday 17 July 2026 | Security | CVSS Score v4 - 9.3 | wg-easy VPN management tool; weak one-time link token allows attackers to brute-force keys, impersonate peers via unauthenticated route without rate limiting.

item.title: crowdsec - Security - CVSS Score v4: 8.2
item.description: Friday 17 July 2026 | Security | CVSS Score v4: 8.2 | CrowdSec protects against malicious IPs; versions 1.7.0 to <1.7.8 allow excessive heap use via unauthenticated gzip JSON decompression.

item.title: Zoom - Patch - CVSS Score: v3 - 9.8
item.description: Friday 17 July 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score: v3 - 9.8 | Zoom Communications Zoom Workplace for Windows enables video meetings; improper input validation allows unauthenticated account takeover via network access.

item.title: Microsoft - Patch - CVSS Score v4 - 9.3
item.description: Friday 17 July 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v4 - 9.3 | Microsoft o365-moodle integrates Office 365 with Moodle; versions before 5.0.5 allow token forgery via unverified JWT, enabling session hijack. More info....

item.title: NASA - Patch - CVSS Score v4 - 8.2
item.description: Friday 17 July 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v4 - 8.2 | NASA Core Flight System manages spacecraft functions; HS app crash via segmentation fault on telemetry request causes denial of service.

item.title: Wazuh - Security - CVSS Score v4 - 10.0
item.description: Thursday 16 July 2026 | Security | CVSS Score v4 - 10.0 | Wazuh security monitoring platform allows agents to inject NDJSON in bulk requests, risking data deletion and alert tampering.

item.title: Splunk - Security - CVSS Score v3: 8.3
item.description: Thursday 16 July 2026 | Security | CVSS Score v3: 8.3 | Splunk Enterprise logs and monitors data; allows for CSRF attacks to run SPL searches as splunk-system-user, exposing credentials.

item.title: F5 - Patch - CVSS Score: v4 - 9.2
item.description: Thursday 16 July 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score: v4 - 9.2 | F5 NGINX Plus web server and reverse proxy; heap buffer overflow via crafted HTTP requests may cause DoS or code execution if ASLR bypassed.

item.title: websockets - Patch - CVSS Score v4 - 8.7
item.description: Thursday 16 July 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v4 - 8.7 | Websockets ws, a node.JS WebSocket library, is vulnerable to memory exhaustion via incomplete fragmented messages allows denial of service. More info....

item.title: Grafana - Patch - CVSS Score v3 - 8.6
item.description: Thursday 16 July 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v3 - 8.6 | Grafana MCP Server manages monitoring and alerting; a flaw allows unauthenticated attackers to steal service tokens and perform SSRF via crafted headers.

item.title: Cisco - Patch - CVSS Score v4 - Multiple
item.description: Thursday 16 July 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v4 - Multiple | Cisco released RoomOS updates fixing multiple flaws (CVSS up to 8.8) including access control, input validation, memory buffer, and encryption flaws.

item.title: SonicWall - Security - CVSS Score v3 - 10.0
item.description: Wednesday 15 July 2026 | Security | CVSS Score v3 - 10.0 | SonicWall SMA1000 secure access appliance; SSRF flaw allows remote attacker to make unintended requests via Work Place interface.

item.title: Microsoft - Monthly - CVSS Score v3: 5.3-9.9
item.description: Wednesday 15 July 2026 | Monthly | CVSS Score v3: 5.3-9.9 | Monthly Microsoft Patch Release: Number of patches: 569, Number of critical patches: 56.

item.title: Adobe - Monthly - CVSS Score: v4 - 2.7-9.9
item.description: Wednesday 15 July 2026 | Monthly | CVSS Score: v4 - 2.7-9.9 | Monthly Adobe Patch Release: Number of patches : 89, Number of critical patches: 13.

item.title: Schneider - Monthly - CVSS Score v4 - 8.4-8.7
item.description: Wednesday 15 July 2026 | Monthly | CVSS Score v4 - 8.4-8.7 | Monthly Schneider Electric Patch Release: Number of patches: 2, Number of critical patches: 0. More info....

item.title: Rockwell - Patch - CVSS Score v4 - 5.4-10.0
item.description: Wednesday 15 July 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v4 - 5.4-10.0 | Monthly Rockwell Automation Monthly Patch Release: Number of patches: 16, Number of critical patches: 2.

item.title: MISP - Security - CVSS Score v4 - 8.3
item.description: Tuesday 14 July 2026 | Security | CVSS Score v4 - 8.3 | MISP misp-modules: Threat intelligence platform modules; SSRF bypass via IPv4-mapped IPv6 addresses allowed internal service access, now fixed.

item.title: SAP - Monthly - CVSS Score v3: 3.3-10.0
item.description: Tuesday 14 July 2026 | Monthly | CVSS Score v3: 3.3-10.0 | Monthly: Number of patches: 20, Number of critical patches: 4.

item.title: WAGO - OT - CVSS Score: v4 - 9.8
item.description: Tuesday 14 July 2026 | OT | CVSS Score: v4 - 9.8 | WAGO 0765-410x/0100-0000 controls industrial I/O systems; an undocumented diagnostic mode allows unauthenticated remote access early in boot, risking full compromise.

item.title: ServiceNow - Patch - CVSS Score v4 - 9.5
item.description: Tuesday 14 July 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v4 - 9.5 | ServiceNow AI platform automates workflows; a remote code execution flaw allowed unauthenticated code execution, fixed by security updates. More info....

item.title: Google - Patch - CVSS Score v4 - 9.4
item.description: Tuesday 14 July 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v4 - 9.4 | Google Cloud Dataform manages data workflows; a missing authorization flaw allowed privilege escalation and cross-tenant repository takeover.

item.title: RUGGEDCOM - Patch - CVSS Score v4 - Multiple
item.description: Tuesday 14 July 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v4 - Multiple | Siemens Palo Alto / FortiNet RUGGEDCOM APE1808 security advisory provides mitigations and security recommendations for multiple PAN-OS and FortiOS vulnerabilities.

item.title: ModSecurity - Security - CVSS Score v4 - 8.6
item.description: Monday 13 July 2026 | Security | CVSS Score v4 - 8.6 | ModSecurity WAF engine for Apache, IIS, Nginx, multipart parser removed line breaks, causing missed payload detection in ARGS/ARGS_POST.

item.title: Zitadel - Patch - CVSS Score v3: 8.1
item.description: Monday 13 July 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v3: 8.1 | ZITADEL identity platform manages authentication, OAuth2 token exchange allowed privilege escalation via unchecked token scopes.

item.title: JetBrains - Patch - CVSS Score: v3 - 9.8
item.description: Monday 13 July 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score: v3 - 9.8 | JetBrains IntelliJ IDEA is an integrated development environment, path traversal in workspace ID allows code execution.

item.title: Zeek - Security - CVSS Score v4 - 8.7
item.description: Friday 10 July 2026 | Security | CVSS Score v4 - 8.7 | Zeek network security monitor; FTP analyzer flaw allows remote attackers to cause denial of service via crafted AUTH GSSAPI ADAT token.

item.title: Vim - Patch - CVSS Score v4: 8.4
item.description: Friday 10 July 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v4: 8.4 | AV:L Vim text editor: PHP omni-completion; versions allow OS command execution via crafted PHP files due to unescaped input.

item.title: Siemens - OT - CVSS Score: v4 - 8.4
item.description: Friday 10 July 2026 | OT | CVSS Score: v4 - 8.4 | Siemens SICORE Base system manages industrial communication; flaw in firmware update signature validation allows malicious firmware installation and system compromise.

item.title: BitWarden - Security - CVSS Score v4 - 9.3
item.description: Thursday 09 July 2026 | Security | CVSS Score v4 - 9.3 | Bitwarden Server manages password vaults securely; certain versions allow low-privilege users to access others' vault keys via auth request flaw.

item.title: Juniper - Quarterly - CVSS Score v4: 2.2-10.0
item.description: Thursday 09 July 2026 | Quarterly | CVSS Score v4: 2.2-10.0 | Quarterly: Number of patches: 414, Number of critical patches: 6

item.title: Palo Alto - Monthly - CVSS Score: v3 - 1.1-7.2
item.description: Thursday 09 July 2026 | Monthly | CVSS Score: v3 - 1.1-7.2 | Monthly: Number of patches: 14, Number of critical patches: 0

item.title: Microsoft - Patch - CVSS Score v3 - 9.3
item.description: Thursday 09 July 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v3 - 9.3 | Microsoft Dynamics 365 Customer Voice collects customer feedback; it has a cross-site scripting flaw allowing network spoofing by attackers. More info....

item.title: GitLab - Patch - CVSS Score v3 - Multiple
item.description: Thursday 09 July 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v3 - Multiple | GitLab patches 8 vulnerabilities, including high-severity XSS and HTML injection flaws in CE/EE releases.

item.title: n8n - Patch - CVSS Score v4 - 8.8
item.description: Thursday 09 July 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v4 - 8.8 | n8n workflow automation tool; SQL injection in legacy MySQL v1 node allows arbitrary SQL execution via unparameterized queries in workflows.

item.title: BeyondTrust - Patch - CVSS Score v4 - 9.2
item.description: Tuesday 07 July 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v4 - 9.2 | BeyondTrust Remote Support enables remote IT assistance; a critical pre-auth flaw allows attackers to bypass access controls and gain privileged access.

item.title: Qualcomm - Monthly - CVSS Score v4: 5.3 - 8.8
item.description: Tuesday 07 July 2026 | Monthly | CVSS Score v4: 5.3 - 8.8 | Monthly, Number of patches: 11, Number of critical patches: 0

item.title: Adobe - Patch - CVSS Score: v3 - 10.0
item.description: Tuesday 07 July 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score: v3 - 10.0 | Adobe ColdFusion web application platform; improper input validation allows arbitrary code execution without user interaction.

item.title: Esri - Patch - CVSS Score v4 - 8.8
item.description: Tuesday 07 July 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v4 - 8.8 | Esri ArcGIS Server: GIS server software enabling spatial data management. Directory traversal flaw allows unauthenticated access to sensitive files. More info....

item.title: CIENA - Patch - CVSS Score v3 - 9.1
item.description: Tuesday 07 July 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v3 - 9.1 | CIENA 6500 S-Series: Network transport system; authentication bypass in default SFTP server allows remote access to modify system files.

item.title: B&R - OT - CVSS Score v4 - 9.1
item.description: Tuesday 07 July 2026 | OT | CVSS Score v4 - 9.1 | B&R Industrial Automation APROL controls industrial processes; improper certificate validation before R 4.4-01P5 risks security breaches.

item.title: RedHat - Patch - CVSS Score v3 - 9.8
item.description: Monday 06 July 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v3 - 9.8 | HP Linux printing software; HPLIP has an integer overflow flaw allowing remote attackers to escalate privileges or execute arbitrary code via print data.

item.title: Microsoft - Patch - CVSS Score v3 - 9.0
item.description: Monday 06 July 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v3 - 9.0 | Microsoft Edge browser for web browsing; type confusion flaw allows remote attacker to execute code via network access.

item.title: Apache - Patch - CVSS Score: v4 - 8.9
item.description: Monday 06 July 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score: v4 - 8.9 | Apache Lucene.Net is a text search engine library; it has a path traversal flaw in Replicator library fixed in 4.8.0-beta00018.

item.title: n8n - Patch - CVSS Score v4 - 8.8
item.description: Monday 06 July 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v4 - 8.8 | n8n workflow automation platform; Execute Command node lets authenticated users run arbitrary commands, risking data theft or system compromise. More info.... The Vulnerability Definitions Explained

item.title: WatchGuard - Security - CVSS Score v4 - 4.8-9.2
item.description: Friday 03 July 2026 | Security | CVSS Score v4 - 4.8-9.2 | WatchGuard released 17 patches for vulnerabilities in WatchGuard Firebox products.

item.title: Microsoft - Patch - CVSS Score v3 - 4.8-9.9
item.description: Friday 03 July 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v3 - 4.8-9.9 | Several patches for critical vulnerabilities in Microsoft products released including Exchange Online, M365 Copilot, Azure Synapse, Azure OpenAI, Entra Provisioning System.

item.title: Ubiquiti - Patch - CVSS Score: v3 - Multiple
item.description: Friday 03 July 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score: v3 - Multiple | Ubiquiti Bulletin 066 fixes 25 UniFi vulnerabilities, including critical RCE, auth bypass and privilege escalation.

item.title: NVIDIA - Patch - CVSS Score v4 - 9.8
item.description: Thursday 02 July 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v4 - 9.8 | NVIDIA AIStore framework manages AI data storage; vulnerability allows attackers to bypass authentication causing data tampering, info leaks, and DoS.

item.title: RedHat - Patch - CVSS Score v3 - 8.8
item.description: Thursday 02 July 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v3 - 8.8 | Red Hat Satellite manages system lifecycle; flaw lets user assign admin roles to groups, enabling full privilege escalation and admin access.

item.title: Citrix - Patch - CVSS Score: v3 - 8.8
item.description: Thursday 02 July 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score: v3 - 8.8 | Arbitrary file read and/or denial-of-service condition

item.title: NetScaler - Security - CVSS Score v4 - 8.8
item.description: Wednesday 01 July 2026 | Security | CVSS Score v4 - 8.8 | NetScaler Gateway manages secure remote access; insufficient input validation in SAML IDP mode causes memory overread vulnerability.

item.title: AVTECH - Security - CVSS Score v3 - 8.6
item.description: Wednesday 01 July 2026 | Security | CVSS Score v3 - 8.6 | AVTECH DGM3103SCT is a security device with web management; it has an OS command injection flaw allowing root command execution via console login.

item.title: IBM - Patch - CVSS Score: v3 - 10.0
item.description: Wednesday 01 July 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score: v3 - 10.0 | IBM Langflow OSS manages AI workflows; vulnerability allows attackers full access to secrets, data, internal services, and persistent code execution.

item.title: Adobe - Patch - CVSS Score v3 - 10.0
item.description: Wednesday 01 July 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v3 - 10.0 | Adobe ColdFusion is a web application platform; this allows unrestricted file uploads, enabling arbitrary code execution without user interaction. More info....

item.title: Advantech - Patch - CVSS Score v4 - 9.8
item.description: Wednesday 01 July 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v4 - 9.8 | Advantech Hospital Queuing Management manages patient queues; it exposes sensitive data via unauthenticated access to API documentation URL.

item.title: AWS WAF - Security - CVSS Score v4 - Multiple
item.description: Tuesday 30 June 2026 | Security | CVSS Score v4 - Multiple | AWS WAF HTTP/2 request inspection flaws could allow remote actors to bypass request-body inspection rules in CloudFront or Application Load Balancer deployments.

item.title: Apple - Patch - CVSS Score v3 - 8.8
item.description: Tuesday 30 June 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v3 - 8.8 | Type confusion flaw that could lead to memory corruption when processing malicious web content, affecting Safari, iOS, iPadOS, and macOS.

item.title: RedHat - Patch - CVSS Score: v3 - 8.8
item.description: Tuesday 30 June 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score: v3 - 8.8 | Visual Studio Code Java support extension; flaw allows malicious JavaDoc links to execute arbitrary commands, risking full system compromise.

item.title: ZAP - Security - CVSS Score v4 - 8.8
item.description: Monday 29 June 2026 | Security | CVSS Score v4 - 8.8 | Zed Attack Proxy (ZAP) is a web app security tool; certain versions have insecure deserialization in ViewState, enabling remote code execution.

item.title: OpenProject - Patch - CVSS Score v3 - 9.9
item.description: Monday 29 June 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v3 - 9.9 | OpenProject is web-based project management software. IDOR allows project-admins to hijack Nextcloud/OneDrive folders.

item.title: Linux - Patch - CVSS Score: v3 - 9.8
item.description: Monday 29 June 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score: v3 - 9.8 | Linux kernel OCFS2 DLM fixes region compare bug— corrects off-by-one loop reading past array bounds by replacing '<=' with '<' in dlm_match_regions().

item.title: FFmpeg - Patch - CVSS Score v4 - 8.8
item.description: Monday 29 June 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v4 - 8.8 | FFmpeg multimedia framework decodes video; RASC decoder flaw allows out-of-bounds heap write and read causing memory corruption via crafted stream. More info....

item.title: libssh2 - Patch - CVSS Score v4 - 8.3
item.description: Monday 29 June 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v4 - 8.3 | libssh2 SSH client library; heap buffer overflow via unchecked attribute count in publickey response on 32-bit platforms allows memory corruption.

item.title: RedHat - Security - CVSS Score v3 - 8.1
item.description: Friday 26 June 2026 | Security | CVSS Score v3 - 8.1 | Red Hat Keycloak: Identity and access management system. Authenticated users can bypass all authorization policies via crafted URL with access-denied path.

item.title: Apache - Security - CVSS Score v4 - 8.2
item.description: Friday 26 June 2026 | Security | CVSS Score v4 - 8.2 | Apache Shiro provides security for Java applications; shiro-guice module flaw allows authentication bypass via crafted HTTP request.

item.title: Dell Wyse - Patch - CVSS Score v3 - 9.8
item.description: Friday 26 June 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v3 - 9.8 | Dell Wyse Management Suite manages endpoint devices; this allows remote low-privilege attackers to execute code remotely. More info....

item.title: EVoke - Patch - CVSS Score v4 - 9.4
item.description: Friday 26 June 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v4 - 9.4 | EVoke CSMS manages electric vehicle charging; WebSocket endpoints lack authentication, allowing attackers to impersonate stations and escalate privileges.

item.title: Rapid7 - Security - CVSS Score v3 - 8.8
item.description: Thursday 25 June 2026 | Security | CVSS Score v3 - 8.8 | Rapid7 InsightConnect Sed Plugin automates security tasks; OS command injection via expression parameter allows arbitrary command execution.

item.title: Google - Patch - CVSS Score v4 - 10.0
item.description: Thursday 25 June 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v4 - 10.0 | Google Cloud Gemini CLI manages cloud workflows; improper neutralisation in container launcher allows host-level code execution via crafted files.

item.title: GitLab - Patch - CVSS Score: v3 - 8.7
item.description: Thursday 25 June 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score: v3 - 8.7 | GitLab 19.0 <19.0.3: Web-based DevOps platform; flaw lets developer-role users run arbitrary client-side code via un-sanitised input.

item.title: ProFTPD - Patch - CVSS Score v4 - 8.6
item.description: Thursday 25 June 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v4 - 8.6 | ProFTPD FTP server: Authenticated users bypass Directory ACLs via /proc/self/root in RNFR, enabling unauthorised file renames and access. More info....

item.title: n8n - Patch - CVSS Score 9.1-10.
item.description: Thursday 25 June 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score 9.1-10. | n8n workflow automation tool; SQL injection in MySQL, PostgreSQL, MS SQL nodes allow authenticated users to execute unauthorised database commands.

item.title: Definitions - Type - Monthly - N/A
item.description: Thursday 25 June 2026 | Monthly | N/A | Vendors of cyber security products should know better and given their importance they are highlighted when vulnerable, often combined with critival severity +24hrs This bottom descriptor is used with Indicates an alert state which has been present for more than 24 hours. This bottom descriptor indicates that patches are available for vulnerabilities, whether it is the initial report or a patch of a vulnerability that had been previously reported. This bottom descriptor indicates that an Exploit has been made public for a vulnerability, whether it is the initial report or an indication of an exploit for a vulnerability that had been previously reported. This bottom descriptor indicates that the vulnerable product is Operational Technology (OT) such as an Industrial Control System (ICS). OT is not to be confused with Information Technology (IT) This bottom descriptor indicates that a vulnerability has been announced without the opportunity for the vendor to patch it before the details are made known. Whilst vulnerabilities reported are remotely exploitable, there are rare occasions when we will report on a vulnerability with a locally exploitable attack vector (AV:L) Several vendors release multiple patches on or around the same day each month. The severity level will reflect the highest vulnerability © Computer Network Defence Limited 2026 Privacy Notice Terms & Conditions Send us a Message
